# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.image.repository }}-config

resources: {}
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.name }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Values.name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ .Values.name }}
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: {{ .Values.name }}
        image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.name }}
spec:
  rules:
  - host: {{ .Values.domain }}
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        backend:
          serviceName: {{ .Values.name }}
          servicePort: 80
